title: George Town, Penang — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to George Town, Penang: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

George Town is a city in Penang with a population of 794,000. Penang’s UNESCO-listed capital, famous for its street art, colonial architecture, and world-renowned street food.
